tickets.subject: Cannot login to account
tickets.description: User receives 'Invalid credentials' even with correct password. Password reset did not help.

tickets.subject: Payment failed during checkout
tickets.description: Credit card payment times out after 30 seconds. PayPal works fine.

tickets.subject: Reports page is very slow
tickets.description: Daily reports page takes 30+ seconds to load. Was fast before Jan 10.

tickets.subject: Cannot export data to CSV
tickets.description: Export button downloads empty CSV file. Bug started on version 2.4.1.

tickets.subject: Cannot login to account
tickets.description: Same issue as T-1001. Login broken after password expiry.

tickets.subject: App crashes on mobile
tickets.description: iOS app crashes immediately after login. Android works fine. iPhone 14, iOS 17.2.

tickets.subject: Payment failed during checkout
tickets.description: Payment gateway timeout. Same as T-1002.

tickets.subject: Wrong email notifications
tickets.description: Receiving order confirmation emails for other users. Privacy concern.

tickets.subject: Dashboard data not updated
tickets.description: Dashboard shows data from yesterday even though today is Jan 13.

tickets.subject: Cannot login to account
tickets.description: Third report of login issues this week. Investigating common root cause.

tickets.subject: API rate limit too aggressive
tickets.description: Integration partner hitting rate limits at 100 req/min. Need higher limit.

tickets.subject: App crashes on mobile
tickets.description: Second mobile crash report. iOS 17 specific issue.

tickets.subject: Reports page is very slow
tickets.description: Third slow reports complaint. Related to DB pool exhaustion on Jan 15.

tickets.subject: Billing invoice incorrect
tickets.description: Invoice shows double charge for January subscription.

tickets.subject: Feature request: dark mode
tickets.description: Please add dark mode to the web app. Many users have requested it.
